[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011011110 6
1 100110011 5
2 100000000 1
3 000001111 4
4 101110100 5
5 100011101 5
6 011001110 5
7 000001111 4

12 21 111001110 6
23 32 011011110 6 match 0

45 54 111010011 6
56 65 011000001 3
67 76 110100101 5
70 07 110000100 3

13 31 100010000 2
24 42 100011101 5 match 5
35 53 000010000 1
46 64 100010010 3
57 75 101100100 4
60 06 000100001 2
71 17 001100100 3

14 41 011010011 5
25 52 011001110 5 match 6
36 63 011010001 4
47 74 010110111 6
50 05 011100000 3
61 16 111000001 4
72 27 110101010 5

04 40 100110011 5 match 1
15 51 100000000 1 match 2
26 62 000001111 4 match 3 7
37 73 101110100 5 match 4
